{{Infobox location
| name = Ancestor's Tomb
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Ancestor's Tomb Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Ancestor's [[Tomb]] is an ancient, massive square mausoleum located in [[Sacred Valley]]. Perched on a mountainside near a thousand-foot drop, the structure is built upon enormous pillars and is significantly larger than any building in the [[Heaven's Glory]] School. Its exterior features a large mural of four battling beasts, and its walls are inscribed with ancient [[scripts]] designed to collect [[vital aura]]. The interior is a vast, open space characterized by numerous pillars and additional murals depicting four [[sacred beasts]]: a blue serpentine [[dragon]] on a thunderstorm, a crowned white tiger, a stone warrior with a tortoise shell, and a blazing red phoenix. This four-part symbol also appears on an ornate door at the back of the room, which is believed to lead into a complex [[labyrinth]]. This subterranean maze is considered one of the oldest locations in the world and may serve as a central hub for a global network of tunnels. The tomb has served various roles throughout history, acting as a place of shelter during attacks and housing significant legacies, such as the [[Soulsmithing]] knowledge left by [[Ozmanthus Arelius]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Predating the [[Heaven's Glory]] School by unknown centuries, the Ancestor's [[Tomb]] is a massive square mausoleum supported by vast pillars. The structure features deep, ancient [[scripts]] designed to gather [[vital aura]] and is decorated with murals of four gigantic beasts locked in battle located above the entrance and on the ceiling. As [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] streak toward this site of past battles, a sudden collapse occurs after [[Yerin]] slices one of the pillars. The destruction is punctuated by [[Lindon]]'s scream echoing through every corner of the tomb, leaving [[Anses]] to pick through the resulting ruins.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] predates the [[Heaven's Glory]] School by unknown centuries.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] is a square mausoleum standing on vast pillars.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A mural of four gigantic beasts locked in battle is above the entrance to the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] is set with deep, ancient [[scripts]] that gather [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] streak toward the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] is a massive square building with huge columns and a stone mural of four beasts.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] is a location where battles occurred.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] contains a mural of four beasts on its ceiling.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]'s scream shook every corner of the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] collapsed after [[Yerin]] sliced a pillar.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Anses]] picks through the ruins of the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] contains a picture similar to the door.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is a mausoleum-like structure in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] is a location surrounded by snow in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is a blocky behemoth on titanic pillars.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Ancestor's [[Tomb]] is a location situated along a specific travel route and is secured by a protective script. Although the structure survived an attack by the [[Wandering Titan]], it sustained damage including a cracked pillar and a caved-in roof. The interior of the tomb consists of a wide-open space lined with various pillars. At its entrance, a mural depicting the four [[Dreadgods]] can be found.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The route passes the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is protected by a script.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] survived the [[Wandering Titan]]’s attack.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] has a caved-in roof and one cracked pillar.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The inside of the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is a wide-open space lined with pillars.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The entrance to the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] contains a mural of the four Dreadgods.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is in the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] was marked by a four-part symbol.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is a structure added to seal and control [[labyrinth]] exits.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] entered the [[labyrinth]] through the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] contains a stone door that [[Lindon]] approached.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Ancestor’s [[Tomb]] is located just outside the former site of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
